headline: 3 Equal Weight ETFs Beating the S&P 500 in 2026 as Mega-Cap Dominance Fades
summary: The S&P 500 you own through a standard index fund is not as diversified as it looks. The cap-weighted version of the index hands roughly a third of your money to a handful of mega-cap technology names, meaning five or six companies effectively drive your returns.
